content.formation: Formed June 20, 2024 in Delaware, governed by Operating Agreement
content.funding: $100,000 capital contribution on January 30, 2025 by parent GRNA LLC
content.purpose: Filing initial franchise disclosure document and selling GRNA FC franchises
content.operational_status: As of January 31, 2025, the Company did not commence operations
content.entity_type: LLC; obligations of member limited to capital contributions

content.basis_of_preparation: Accrual basis of accounting in accordance with US GAAP
content.cash: Balances insured by FDIC up to $250,000 per institution. No uninsured cash as of January 31, 2025
content.income_taxes: LLC pass-through election; not subject to federal income taxes; all taxable income passed through to member
content.use_of_estimates: Standard GAAP estimates and assumptions disclosure

not_applicable_policies: Related party transactions (only capital contribution from parent)
Advertising fund accounting (fund not yet established)
Deferred franchise fees (no franchise agreements signed)
